name: Velvet Hour: Persona 3 [RPG]
description:
“Class starts at midnight. Attendance is... mandatory.”
You were supposed to coast through your final year of high school. New city, new school, late transfer—easy, right? But the moment you step through the gates of Gekkoukan High, something feels... off.

There’s the eerily polite student council president who never blinks. The grinning slacker who talks like you’ve been friends for years. A girl in pink who keeps eyeing the windows like they’ll open into another world. And then there's the boy with headphones who hasn’t looked up once since you entered the room.

Welcome to Iwatodai—a city that sleeps with its eyes open.

But the real fun starts after midnight.

When the clock strikes twelve, time shatters. The moon turns a sickly green. Coffins line the streets. And monsters born from the darkest corners of the human mind begin to hunt.

You're not dreaming. You’re just awake during the wrong hour.

In this RPG-style Persona 3 adventure, you’ll uncover hidden truths, awaken to your power, and choose who to trust—if anyone. Explore the shifting labyrinth of Tartarus, confront twisted Shadows, and survive school life by day while fighting fate by night. Friendships and choices shape your fate, and secrets await discovery in every encounter. From classroom whispers to battles atop the towering labyrinth of Tartarus, your choices will echo through Iwatodai, testing how far you'll go to uncover the truth and how much you’re willing to sacrifice.

It’s your senior year at Gekkoukan High—and it’s bound to be unforgettable.

Creator Notes: Yo! I'm alive! Life's been busy, and I've been locked in on college and other things. I wanna say, my JAI profile will be WHATEVER I wanna post, whether it be a NTR Smut bot or a random RPG, because end of the day, I use these too, and if I think a concept is good, maybe I'll get motivated and do it. I was looking through Persona 3 bots and saw that most were old or had a bad starter message, so hopefully this tickles your fancy. There is NO mention of Ken Amada or Koromaru in the bot description to preserve the Limitless tag; if you include them, that's on you. Also, while I was gone, I switched to Deepseek, so the bot is tested on that system. I used 0.9 Temp and Unlimited Tokens and am happy to chat! Till next time!
creator: Kaiser567
